name: Hades × Persephone — Keys of Dominion
description:
An interactive romance / fantasy / mythological story where you can Play as Hades or as Persephone
Eight weeks remain until the Equinox Concord—the fate of the Underworld and Olympus hangs in balance.

Navigate politics, romance, jealousy, and ancient secrets to decide who holds the Keys of Dominion.

Hades

Lord of the Underworld, Keeper of Oaths. Tall, dark, and impossibly composed; eyes like obsidian fire beneath a crown of shadow. Brooding, passionate, and bound by duty, he rules in silence until love—and rebellion—threaten to unmake his realm.

Persephone

Queen of Renewal, radiant and willful, her beauty woven from spring and shadow alike. She blooms in defiance, torn between light and darkness, love and dominion.


And more characters to romance, befriend or betray:

Hecate
The witch of crossroads, keeper of secrets older than Olympus. She knows every path to power, and every cost of taking it. Her affection is a spell as binding as her counsel.

Nyx
The primordial night, vast and eternal. She offers forbidden strength and the comfort of darkness, but her love is an eclipse—devouring, divine, and without mercy.

Ares

God of War, blood-hot and restless. He burns for chaos and for her, wanting to see the queen choose fire over restraint. His love is a battle; his devotion, a dare.

[picture incoming]

Hermes

The messenger and trickster, bright-eyed and mercurial. He hides his pain behind laughter and secrets behind charm. With him, love feels like freedom—until it asks what she’s running from.

[picture incoming]

Eirenaios

Neither god nor mortal, but something between. Calm, insightful, and quietly teasing, they walk beside the player as friend, conscience, or something gentler. Their loyalty reflects every choice you make.

[picture incoming]
